moments.title: England vs Ghana in World Cup
moments.blurb: England faces Ghana in their second group stage match of the FIFA World Cup 2026 in Boston, USA, on Tuesday.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: England vs Ghana tomorrow! Who's feeling confident for the Three Lions' second World Cup group game?

angles.name: Score Prediction
angles.copy: It's England's second #FIFAWorldCup match tomorrow against Ghana. What's your score prediction?

moments.title: Scotland vs Brazil in World Cup
moments.blurb: Scotland takes on five-time champions Brazil in their final FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage match on Wednesday.

angles.name: Match Anticipation
angles.copy: It's the big one! Scotland vs Brazil in the World Cup on Wednesday. Can Steve Clarke's side pull off a shock?

angles.name: Brazilian Challenge
angles.copy: Scotland's World Cup journey continues with a massive challenge against Brazil on Wednesday. Where are you watching?

moments.title: Wales hosts UEFA U19 EURO Finals
moments.blurb: Wales is hosting the UEFA Under-19 European Championship finals across North Wales, with matches commencing on Sunday, June 28, and Cymru's first match against Spain.

angles.name: Home Advantage
angles.copy: North Wales is ready! The UEFA U19 EURO Finals kick off this Sunday, with Cymru facing Spain. Get behind the young Dragons!

angles.name: Upcoming Fixture
angles.copy: Big week for Welsh football! The UEFA U19 EURO Finals start Sunday, June 28, with Wales taking on Spain. Who's going?

moments.title: Wimbledon Qualifiers Underway
moments.blurb: The qualifying rounds for Wimbledon 2026 are currently underway from June 22-25, with the main draw starting June 29.

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: The grass courts are calling! Wimbledon qualifying is happening now, with the main tournament kicking off next Monday. Who are you hoping to see make it through?

angles.name: London's Tennis Fever
angles.copy: London is buzzing with tennis fever as Wimbledon qualifiers continue. The main event starts next week!

moments.title: Wales Rugby vs Barbarians
moments.blurb: Wales will play a warm-up rugby match against the Barbarians at Twickenham on Saturday, June 27, ahead of their Nations Championship campaign.

angles.name: Rugby Kick-off
angles.copy: The Welsh rugby team is back in action this Saturday! Wales take on the Barbarians at Twickenham. Who's excited?

angles.name: Twickenham Clash
angles.copy: Get ready for some rugby! Wales face the Barbarians this Saturday at Twickenham. A big warm-up before the Nations Championship!

moments.title: Alanis Morissette at Blenheim Palace
moments.blurb: Seven-time GRAMMY Award-winning artist Alanis Morissette is scheduled to perform at the Blenheim Palace Festival on July 3.

angles.name: Iconic Live Show
angles.copy: Jagged Little Pill live! Alanis Morissette is bringing her iconic sound to Blenheim Palace on July 3rd. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: Anticipating Alanis
angles.copy: Counting down to Alanis Morissette at Blenheim Palace on July 3rd! What's your favourite track you hope to hear live?

moments.title: UK Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The UK Official Singles Chart is updated weekly, reflecting the most popular tracks across the country.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: What's hitting different on the UK Official Singles Chart right now? Tune in to Nation Hits to hear the biggest tracks!

angles.name: Your No.1
angles.copy: The battle for number one is always hot! What track deserves to be at the top of the UK Official Singles Chart this week?

moments.title: Love Island UK 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which began on June 1, continues to air nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily drama from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Love Island is heating up! Who's your favourite couple and who do you think is playing a game?

angles.name: Tonight's Episode
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! What are your predictions for tonight's episode?

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday Cyndi Lauper
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning pop icon Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', turns 73 today.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Still shining bright after all these years. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 73rd Birthday to the legendary Cyndi Lauper! Her music still brings so much joy.

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday Todd Rundgren
moments.blurb: Influential rock musician, songwriter, and producer Todd Rundgren, known for his eclectic career and hits like 'Hello It's Me', celebrates his 78th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the truly innovative Todd Rundgren! A wizard, a true star, and a rock legend. What's your go-to Todd track?

angles.name: Music Visionary
angles.copy: Celebrating the 78th birthday of music visionary Todd Rundgren today! His influence spans decades and genres.

moments.title: Happy 71st Birthday Glenn Danzig
moments.blurb: Glenn Danzig, the iconic frontman of The Misfits, Samhain, and Danzig, celebrates his 71st birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Glenn Danzig turns 71! From The Misfits to Danzig, his impact on punk and metal is undeniable.

angles.name: Horror Punk King
angles.copy: Wishing a future Happy 71st Birthday to Glenn Danzig! What's your favourite Misfits or Danzig track?

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday KT Tunstall
moments.blurb: Scottish singer-songwriter KT Tunstall, known for her folk-pop and indie rock sound and hits like 'Black Horse and the Cherry Tree', turns 51 tomorrow.

angles.name: Scottish Talent
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday for tomorrow to the amazing KT Tunstall! Still loving 'Suddenly I See'. What's your favourite of her songs?

angles.name: Folk-Pop Star
angles.copy: Celebrating KT Tunstall's 51st birthday tomorrow! Her unique sound made waves in the 2000s and beyond.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Mick Fleetwood
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer and co-founder of Fleetwood Mac, Mick Fleetwood, celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Mick Fleetwood on Wednesday! What's your all-time favourite Fleetwood Mac track?

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: The legendary Mick Fleetwood turns 79 on Wednesday! Celebrate by cranking up some classic Fleetwood Mac.

moments.title: Happy 40th Birthday Solange Knowles
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer, songwriter, and artist Solange Knowles, known for her distinctive R&B and soul sound, turns 40 on Wednesday.

angles.name: 40 & Fabulous
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday on Wednesday to the incredible Solange Knowles! Her artistry continues to inspire.

angles.name: Soulful Sounds
angles.copy: Celebrating Solange Knowles' 40th birthday on Wednesday! What's your favourite track from this soulful artist?

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday Carly Simon
moments.blurb: Iconic singer-songwriter Carly Simon, famous for hits like 'You're So Vain' and 'Nobody Does It Better', celebrates her 83rd birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: 70s Superstar
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the legendary Carly Simon on Thursday! 'You're So Vain' is still an absolute classic.

angles.name: Timeless Hits
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 83rd Birthday to Carly Simon this Thursday! Her timeless songs are the soundtrack to so many memories.

moments.title: Happy 70th Birthday Chris Isaak
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Chris Isaak, known for his distinctive rockabilly-influenced sound and the hit 'Wicked Game', turns 70 on Friday.

angles.name: Rockabilly King
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to the cool and charismatic Chris Isaak this Friday! 'Wicked Game' is still hauntingly brilliant.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating Chris Isaak's 70th birthday on Friday! His unique style and voice have given us so many unforgettable songs.

moments.title: Happy 29th Birthday H.E.R.
moments.blurb: Five-time Grammy Award-winning R&B singer H.E.R. (Gabriella Wilson) celebrates her 29th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: R&B Star
angles.copy: Happy 29th Birthday to the incredibly talented H.E.R. this Saturday! What's your favourite track from the R&B superstar?

angles.name: Grammy Winner
angles.copy: Celebrating H.E.R.'s 29th birthday on Saturday! A true musical force, her songs always hit different.

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known as the lead singer of The Pussycat Dolls, turns 48 on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Pop Diva
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger on Monday! From Pussycat Dolls to solo star, she always delivers.

angles.name: Dance Floor Queen
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Nicole Scherzinger's 48th birthday this Monday! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

moments.title: Happy 55th Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott, a five-time Grammy winner, celebrates her 55th birthday on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the iconic Missy Elliott on July 1st! Her influence on music and culture is undeniable.

angles.name: Unforgettable Videos
angles.copy: Celebrate Missy Elliott's 55th birthday this Wednesday! What's your favourite music video from the legendary artist?

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday Deborah Harry
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the legendary lead vocalist of new wave band Blondie, known for hits like 'Heart of Glass' and 'Call Me', turns 81 on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Debbie Harry on July 1st! Still rockin' and ruling the airwaves.

angles.name: New Wave Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry this Wednesday! A true new wave queen.

moments.title: Happy 43rd Birthday Michelle Branch
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for her pop-rock hits in the early 2000s, celebrates her 43rd birthday on Thursday, July 2.

angles.name: 00s Pop Rock
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to Michelle Branch on July 2nd! Still loving those early 2000s pop-rock anthems.

angles.name: Singer-Songwriter
angles.copy: Wishing Michelle Branch a fantastic 43rd Birthday this Thursday! Her songs are still on repeat for many.

moments.title: UK Braces for Heatwave
moments.blurb: The UK is currently bracing for a heatwave, with an amber extreme heat warning issued for parts of southern England, southeast Wales, and the Midlands, potentially peaking at 37°C on Tuesday and Wednesday.

angles.name: Heatwave Alert
angles.copy: Stay safe and hydrated! An amber heat warning is in place for parts of the UK today and tomorrow, with temperatures soaring. Look out for each other!

angles.name: South West Heat
angles.copy: Devon, it's going to be a hot one! An amber heat warning is active for our region. Remember to stay cool and drink plenty of water.

moments.title: Northern Ireland School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays for Northern Ireland officially begin on Wednesday, July 1, marking the start of a long break for students.

angles.name: Schools Out
angles.copy: Freedom! Northern Ireland schools break up for summer this Wednesday, July 1st. What are your big plans for the holidays?

angles.name: Summer Fun
angles.copy: The summer holidays officially begin for NI schools this Wednesday! Time for some well-deserved fun and relaxation.
